subcodes.first_line: O my God, my God! These are handmaidens who have been drawn to the Kingdom of Beauty, set ablaze by the fire kindled in the Tree of Sinai, and detached from all else but Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی هولاء امآء انجذبن الی ملکوت الجمال و اشتعلن بنار الموقدة فی سدره سینآء و انقطعن عما سواک
subcodes.subjects: @equality of men and women, @prayer for women, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @praise and encouragement
